title: Plump Dutch Uni Pancakes
description: Rich and chewy Dutch pancakes filled with uni and cooked in render fat, perfect for a quick and delicious snack. This vegetarian friendly dish is a unique twist on traditional pancakes.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Heat the render fat in a large skillet over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter into the skillet.
Top each pancake with a spoonful of uni.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with melted butter on top.
